201.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abdullah ibn Mas'ud (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'Whoever swears a false oath to wrongfully seize the property of a Muslim will meet Allah while He is angry with him.' Then Allah revealed: 'Indeed, those who exchange the covenant of Allah and their own oaths for a small price...' [Quran 3:77]
201.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abdullah ibn Mas'ud (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Barangsiapa bersumpah palsu untuk mengambil harta seorang Muslim secara tidak sah, maka ia akan menemui Allah dalam keadaan Allah murka kepadanya.' Kemudian Allah menurunkan: 'Sesungguhnya orang-orang yang menukar janji Allah dan sumpah-sumpah mereka dengan harga yang sedikit...' [QS 3:77]'

202.iwh_en: It was narrated that al-Ash'ath ibn Qays entered and said: 'What is Abu Abd al-Rahman narrating to you?' They informed him, and al-Ash'ath said: 'He spoke truthfully — it was revealed concerning me. I had a dispute with a man over a well. The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said to me: «Bring your proof or he will take an oath.» I said: Then he will swear falsely. The Prophet ﷺ said: «Whoever swears falsely to seize the property of a Muslim while Allah is looking at him, Allah will be angry with him when he meets Him.»'
202.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan bahwa al-Ash'ath ibn Qays masuk dan berkata: 'Apa yang diceritakan Abu Abd al-Rahman kepada kalian?' Mereka memberitahunya, dan al-Ash'ath berkata: 'Ia berkata benar — ayat itu turun berkenaan denganku. Aku berselisih dengan seseorang tentang sebuah sumur. Rasulullah ﷺ berkata kepadaku: «Hadirkan saksimu, atau ia yang akan bersumpah.» Aku berkata: Kalau begitu ia akan bersumpah palsu. Nabi ﷺ bersabda: «Barangsiapa bersumpah palsu untuk mengambil harta seorang Muslim sementara Allah melihatnya, Allah akan murka kepadanya saat ia bertemu dengan-Nya.»'

203.iwh_en: It was narrated from al-Ash'ath ibn Qays (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'Whoever swears a false oath to seize the property of a Muslim will meet Allah while He is angry with him.'
203.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari al-Ash'ath ibn Qays (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Barangsiapa bersumpah palsu untuk mengambil harta seorang Muslim, ia akan menemui Allah dalam keadaan Allah murka kepadanya.'

204.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abdullah ibn Mas'ud (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'Whoever swears a false oath to seize the property of a Muslim unlawfully will meet Allah on the Day of Resurrection while He is angry with him.' Then Allah revealed: 'Indeed, those who exchange the covenant of Allah and their own oaths for a small price...' to the end of the verse.
204.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abdullah ibn Mas'ud (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Barangsiapa bersumpah palsu untuk mengambil harta seorang Muslim secara tidak sah, ia akan menemui Allah pada hari Kiamat dalam keadaan Allah murka kepadanya.' Kemudian Allah menurunkan: 'Sesungguhnya orang-orang yang menukar janji Allah dan sumpah-sumpah mereka dengan harga yang sedikit...' hingga akhir ayat.'

205.iwh_en: It was narrated from al-Ash'ath ibn Qays (may Allah be pleased with him) that a man from Kinda and a man from Hadramawt disputed before the Messenger of Allah ﷺ over some land in Yemen. The man from Hadramawt said: 'O Messenger of Allah, this man's father seized my land and it is now in his possession.' The Prophet ﷺ said to the Kindi: 'Do you have a proof?' He said: 'No.' He said: 'Then you must take an oath.' He said: 'O Messenger of Allah, he is a liar — he will swear.' The Prophet ﷺ said: 'Whoever swears a false oath to seize someone's property will meet Allah while He is angry with him and has prepared for him the Hellfire.' The man said: 'What is in it for him, O Messenger of Allah?' He said: 'Nothing.' So he took the oath and received the land.
205.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari al-Ash'ath ibn Qays (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa seorang dari Kinda dan seorang dari Hadramawt berselisih di hadapan Rasulullah ﷺ tentang sebidang tanah di Yaman. Orang dari Hadramawt berkata: 'Wahai Rasulullah, ayah orang ini telah merampas tanahku dan kini ada di tangannya.' Nabi ﷺ berkata kepada orang Kinda: 'Apakah kamu punya bukti?' Ia berkata: 'Tidak.' Beliau berkata: 'Kalau begitu ia yang bersumpah.' Ia berkata: 'Wahai Rasulullah, ia pembohong — ia akan bersumpah.' Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Barangsiapa bersumpah palsu untuk mengambil harta seseorang, ia akan menemui Allah dalam keadaan Allah murka kepadanya dan telah menyiapkan neraka untuknya.' Orang itu berkata: 'Lalu apa untungnya baginya, wahai Rasulullah?' Beliau berkata: 'Tidak ada.' Maka ia bersumpah dan mendapatkan tanah itu.'

206.iwh_en: It was narrated from al-Ash'ath ibn Qays (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: «Do not be the first to greet a Jew or Christian. And if you meet one of them on the road, force him to the narrowest part of the path.»'
206.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari al-Ash'ath ibn Qays (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: «Janganlah kalian memulai salam kepada orang Yahudi atau Nasrani. Dan jika kalian bertemu salah seorang dari mereka di jalan, paksalah ia ke bagian jalan yang paling sempit.»'

207.iwh_en: It was narrated from al-Ash'ath ibn Qays (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Whoever does not thank people does not thank Allah.'
207.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari al-Ash'ath ibn Qays (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Barangsiapa tidak berterima kasih kepada manusia, ia tidak bersyukur kepada Allah.'

208.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abdullah ibn Mas'ud (may Allah be pleased with him) — three hadiths — that he said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: «Do not wish to meet the enemy, but if you meet them, be patient. Know that Paradise lies beneath the shade of swords.»' And he said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: «Whoever dies without associating anything with Allah will enter Paradise.»' And he said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: «Modesty is part of faith.»'
208.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abdullah ibn Mas'ud (radhiyallahu 'anhu) — tiga hadits — bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: «Janganlah kalian mengharapkan bertemu musuh, tetapi jika kalian bertemu mereka, bersabarlah. Ketahuilah bahwa surga berada di bawah naungan pedang.»' Dan ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: «Barangsiapa meninggal dalam keadaan tidak menyekutukan Allah dengan sesuatu pun, ia akan masuk surga.»' Dan ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: «Malu adalah bagian dari iman.»'

209.iwh_en: It was narrated from al-Ash'ath ibn Qays (may Allah be pleased with him) that a man from Kinda and a man from Hadramawt disputed before the Messenger of Allah ﷺ. The man from Hadramawt said: 'O Messenger of Allah, ask him — for he has land that his father seized from me.' The Kindi said: 'It is my land in my possession — I have no obligation toward him.' The Prophet ﷺ said to the Hadrami: 'Bring your proof.' He said: 'I have no proof.' He said: 'Then his oath suffices against you.' He said: 'O Messenger of Allah, he is a man with no religion — he will not hesitate to swear.' The Prophet ﷺ said: 'You have no recourse against him except his oath.' So he went to swear, and the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'As for the man who takes this oath to seize property that is not his, he will meet Allah while Allah is turning away from him.'
209.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari al-Ash'ath ibn Qays (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa seorang dari Kinda dan seorang dari Hadramawt berselisih di hadapan Rasulullah ﷺ. Orang dari Hadramawt berkata: 'Wahai Rasulullah, tanyailah ia — sebab ia memiliki tanah yang ayahnya merampas dariku.' Orang Kinda berkata: 'Itu tanahku yang ada di tanganku — aku tidak punya kewajiban apa-apa kepadanya.' Nabi ﷺ berkata kepada orang Hadrami: 'Hadirkan buktimu.' Ia berkata: 'Aku tidak punya bukti.' Beliau berkata: 'Kalau begitu sumpahnya cukup menolak klaimmu.' Ia berkata: 'Wahai Rasulullah, ia adalah orang yang tidak beragama — ia tidak akan ragu bersumpah.' Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Kamu tidak punya jalan lain terhadapnya kecuali sumpahnya.' Maka ia pergi untuk bersumpah, dan Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Adapun orang yang bersumpah ini untuk mengambil harta yang bukan miliknya, ia akan menemui Allah sementara Allah berpaling darinya.'

210.iwh_en: It was narrated from Khuzayma ibn Thabit (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ forbade approaching wives from behind.
210.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Khuzayma ibn Thabit (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ melarang mendatangi istri dari arah belakang (dubur).'

211.iwh_en: It was narrated from Khuzayma ibn Thabit (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ permitted wiping over leather socks for three days and nights for the traveler and one day and night for the resident.
211.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Khuzayma ibn Thabit (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ mengizinkan mengusap khuf (sepatu kulit) selama tiga hari tiga malam bagi musafir dan satu hari satu malam bagi orang yang mukim.'

212.iwh_en: It was narrated from Khuzayma ibn Thabit (may Allah be pleased with him) from the Prophet ﷺ that he set the wiping period over leather socks at three days for the traveler and one day for the resident.
212.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Khuzayma ibn Thabit (radhiyallahu 'anhu) dari Nabi ﷺ bahwa beliau menetapkan masa mengusap khuf tiga hari bagi musafir dan satu hari bagi orang mukim.'

213.iwh_en: It was narrated from Khuzayma ibn Thabit (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Wipe over the leather socks — three days for the traveler and a day and night for the resident.'
213.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Khuzayma ibn Thabit (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Usaplah khuf — tiga hari bagi musafir dan sehari semalam bagi orang mukim.'

214.iwh_en: It was narrated from Khuzayma ibn Thabit al-Absi (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Wipe over the leather socks for three days if you are a traveler, and for one day if you are a resident.'
214.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Khuzayma ibn Thabit al-Absi (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Usaplah khuf selama tiga hari jika kamu musafir, dan sehari jika kamu mukim.'

215.iwh_en: It was narrated from Khuzayma ibn Thabit al-Ansari (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ set a duration of one day and night for the resident and three days and nights for the traveler regarding wiping over leather socks.
215.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Khuzayma ibn Thabit al-Anshari (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ menetapkan masa sehari semalam bagi orang mukim dan tiga hari tiga malam bagi musafir dalam masalah mengusap khuf.'

216.iwh_en: It was narrated from Khuzayma ibn Thabit (may Allah be pleased with him) that we asked the Messenger of Allah ﷺ about wiping over leather socks, and he said: 'Three days for the traveler and a day for the resident.'
216.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Khuzayma ibn Thabit (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa kami bertanya kepada Rasulullah ﷺ tentang mengusap khuf, dan beliau bersabda: 'Tiga hari bagi musafir dan sehari bagi orang mukim.'

217.iwh_en: It was narrated from Khuzayma ibn Thabit (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Indeed, Allah is not shy of the truth — do not approach women in their rear parts.'
217.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Khuzayma ibn Thabit (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Sesungguhnya Allah tidak malu dari kebenaran — janganlah kalian mendatangi perempuan dari arah dubur mereka.'

218.iwh_en: It was narrated from Khuzayma ibn Thabit (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'We asked the Messenger of Allah ﷺ and he permitted wiping over leather socks for three days for the traveler and a day and night for the resident.'
218.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Khuzayma ibn Thabit (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Kami bertanya kepada Rasulullah ﷺ dan beliau mengizinkan mengusap khuf selama tiga hari bagi musafir dan sehari semalam bagi orang mukim.'

219.iwh_en: It was narrated from Sa'd ibn Malik, Khuzayma ibn Thabit, and Usama ibn Zayd (may Allah be pleased with them) that they said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: «Do not approach women in their rear parts.»'
219.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Sa'd ibn Malik, Khuzayma ibn Thabit, dan Usama ibn Zayd (radhiyallahu 'anhum) bahwa mereka berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: «Janganlah kalian mendatangi perempuan dari arah dubur mereka.»'

220.iwh_en: It was narrated from Khuzayma ibn Thabit (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said regarding wiping over leather socks: 'Three days for the traveler and one day for the resident.'
220.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Khuzayma ibn Thabit (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda tentang mengusap khuf: 'Tiga hari bagi musafir dan sehari bagi orang mukim.'

221.iwh_en: It was narrated from Khuzayma ibn Thabit (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ made wiping over leather socks permissible — three days and nights for the traveler and a day and night for the resident.'
221.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Khuzayma ibn Thabit (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ membolehkan mengusap khuf — tiga hari tiga malam bagi musafir dan sehari semalam bagi orang mukim.'

222.iwh_en: It was narrated from Khuzayma ibn Thabit (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: «Do not approach women in their rear parts.»'
222.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Khuzayma ibn Thabit (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: «Janganlah kalian mendatangi perempuan dari arah dubur mereka.»'

223.iwh_en: It was narrated from Khuzayma ibn Thabit (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'I saw in a dream that I was prostrating on the forehead of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ. I told him of this and he lowered himself for me, and I prostrated on his forehead.' Then he said: 'Khuzayma's testimony counts as the testimony of two men.'
223.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Khuzayma ibn Thabit (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku bermimpi bahwa aku sujud di atas dahi Rasulullah ﷺ. Aku menceritakannya kepada beliau dan beliau membungkuk untukku, maka aku pun sujud di dahinya.' Kemudian beliau bersabda: 'Kesaksian Khuzayma senilai kesaksian dua orang.'

224.iwh_en: It was narrated from Khuzayma ibn Thabit (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Whoever commits a sin upon which the prescribed punishment is carried out, that punishment becomes his expiation for it.'
224.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Khuzayma ibn Thabit (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Barangsiapa melakukan dosa yang dikenakan hukuman had, maka hukuman itu menjadi kaffarah (penebus) baginya.'

225.iwh_en: It was narrated from Khuzayma ibn Thabit (may Allah be pleased with him) from the Prophet ﷺ that he said: 'Whoever commits a sin and the prescribed punishment is carried out on him in this world, Allah is too just to punish His servant twice for one sin.'
225.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Khuzayma ibn Thabit (radhiyallahu 'anhu) dari Nabi ﷺ bahwa beliau bersabda: 'Barangsiapa melakukan dosa lalu dikenakan hukuman had di dunia, maka Allah terlalu adil untuk menghukum hamba-Nya dua kali atas satu dosa.'

226.iwh_en: It was narrated from Khuzayma ibn Thabit (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Do not approach women in their rear parts.'
226.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Khuzayma ibn Thabit (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Janganlah kalian mendatangi perempuan dari arah dubur mereka.'

227.iwh_en: It was narrated from Khuzayma ibn Thabit (may Allah be pleased with him) from the Prophet ﷺ that he permitted wiping over leather socks for three days for the traveler and one day for the resident.
227.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Khuzayma ibn Thabit (radhiyallahu 'anhu) dari Nabi ﷺ bahwa beliau mengizinkan mengusap khuf tiga hari bagi musafir dan sehari bagi orang mukim.'

228.iwh_en: It was narrated from Khuzayma ibn Thabit (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ permitted wiping over leather socks for the duration of three days for the traveler and one day for the resident.
228.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Khuzayma ibn Thabit (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ mengizinkan mengusap khuf selama tiga hari bagi musafir dan sehari bagi orang mukim.'

229.iwh_en: It was narrated from Khuzayma ibn Thabit (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ was asked about purification with stones, and he said: 'Three stones are sufficient, as long as they are clean.'
229.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Khuzayma ibn Thabit (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ ditanya tentang bersuci dengan batu, dan beliau bersabda: 'Tiga batu sudah cukup, selama batu-batu itu bersih.'

230.iwh_en: It was narrated that Muhammad ibn 'Umara ibn Khuzayma ibn Thabit said: 'My grandfather kept his sword sheathed at the Battle of the Camel until Ammar was killed at Siffin. Then he drew his sword and fought until he was killed — may Allah have mercy on him.'
230.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan bahwa Muhammad ibn 'Umara ibn Khuzayma ibn Thabit berkata: 'Kakekku menahan pedangnya pada Perang Unta hingga Ammar terbunuh di Shiffin. Kemudian ia meloloskan pedangnya dan berperang hingga ia terbunuh — semoga Allah merahmatinya.'

231.iwh_en: It was narrated from Khuzayma ibn Thabit (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ permitted wiping over leather socks for three days and nights for the traveler and a day and night for the resident, and that he was asked about purification and said: 'Three stones.'
231.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Khuzayma ibn Thabit (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ mengizinkan mengusap khuf selama tiga hari tiga malam bagi musafir dan sehari semalam bagi orang mukim, dan bahwa beliau ditanya tentang bersuci dan bersabda: 'Tiga batu.'

232.iwh_en: It was narrated from Khuzayma ibn Thabit (may Allah be pleased with him) from the Prophet ﷺ that he gave a concession of three days and nights for the traveler and one day and night for the resident regarding wiping over leather socks.
232.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Khuzayma ibn Thabit (radhiyallahu 'anhu) dari Nabi ﷺ bahwa beliau memberikan keringanan tiga hari tiga malam bagi musafir dan sehari semalam bagi orang mukim dalam mengusap khuf.'

233.iwh_en: It was narrated from Khuzayma ibn Thabit (may Allah be pleased with him) from the Messenger of Allah ﷺ that he said: 'Whoever commits a sin and the prescribed punishment is carried out on him for it, then that is its expiation.'
233.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Khuzayma ibn Thabit (radhiyallahu 'anhu) dari Rasulullah ﷺ bahwa beliau bersabda: 'Barangsiapa melakukan dosa lalu dikenakan hukuman had untuknya, maka itulah kaffarahnya.'

234.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Mas'ud Uqba ibn Amr al-Ansari (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ permitted wiping over leather socks for one day and night for the resident and three days and nights for the traveler.
234.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Mas'ud Uqba ibn Amr al-Anshari (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ mengizinkan mengusap khuf sehari semalam bagi orang mukim dan tiga hari tiga malam bagi musafir.'

235.iwh_en: It was narrated from Khuzayma ibn Thabit (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'I saw in a dream that I was prostrating on the forehead of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ. I mentioned this to him and he bent down, and I prostrated on his forehead.' So the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Your testimony will count as the testimony of two men, O Khuzayma.'
235.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Khuzayma ibn Thabit (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku bermimpi bahwa aku sujud di atas dahi Rasulullah ﷺ. Aku menyebutkannya kepada beliau dan beliau membungkuk, lalu aku sujud di dahinya.' Maka Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Kesaksianmu akan dihitung sebagai kesaksian dua orang, wahai Khuzayma.'

236.iwh_en: It was narrated that the Prophet ﷺ said regarding purification with stones: 'Does not one of you find three stones?' A man from Khuzayma's family narrated from 'Umara ibn Khuzayma ibn Thabit from his father that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'If anyone among you relieves himself, let him use three stones — they will suffice him.'
236.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda tentang bersuci dengan batu: 'Bukankah salah seorang dari kalian dapat menemukan tiga batu?' Seorang dari keluarga Khuzayma meriwayatkan dari 'Umara ibn Khuzayma ibn Thabit dari ayahnya bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Jika salah seorang dari kalian buang air, hendaklah ia menggunakan tiga batu — itu sudah mencukupinya.'

237.iwh_en: It was narrated from Khuzayma ibn Thabit al-Ansari (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Wipe over the leather socks — three days for the traveler and a day and night for the resident.'
237.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Khuzayma ibn Thabit al-Anshari (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Usaplah khuf — tiga hari bagi musafir dan sehari semalam bagi orang mukim.'

238.iwh_en: It was narrated from Khuzayma ibn Thabit (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'The Prophet ﷺ set three days and nights for the traveler and a day and night for the resident regarding wiping over leather socks.'
238.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Khuzayma ibn Thabit (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Nabi ﷺ menetapkan tiga hari tiga malam bagi musafir dan sehari semalam bagi orang mukim dalam mengusap khuf.'

239.iwh_en: It was narrated that Khuzayma ibn Thabit al-Ansari — the one whose testimony the Messenger of Allah ﷺ made equal to the testimony of two men — saw in a dream that he was prostrating on the forehead of the Prophet ﷺ. When morning came, the Prophet ﷺ lowered himself for him and said: 'Indeed Khuzayma has made his dream true.' And he made his testimony equal to that of two men.
239.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan bahwa Khuzayma ibn Thabit al-Anshari — yang kesaksiannya dijadikan Rasulullah ﷺ setara dengan kesaksian dua orang — bermimpi bahwa ia sujud di atas dahi Nabi ﷺ. Ketika pagi tiba, Nabi ﷺ membungkuk untuknya dan bersabda: 'Sesungguhnya Khuzayma telah mewujudkan mimpinya.' Dan beliau menjadikan kesaksiannya setara dengan dua orang.'

240.iwh_en: It was narrated from 'Umara ibn Khuzayma al-Ansari (may Allah be pleased with him) that his uncle — who was one of the Companions of the Prophet ﷺ — narrated to him that the Prophet ﷺ bought a horse from a Bedouin. The Prophet ﷺ called him to pay him, but the Bedouin walked quickly while the Prophet ﷺ was slow. Men surrounded the Bedouin and asked if he had sold to the Prophet ﷺ. He said: 'No.' Khuzayma ibn Thabit then testified that the Prophet had indeed bought it, and the Prophet ﷺ said: 'What made you testify to something you did not witness?' He said: 'I testify by the truthfulness of your revelation.' So the Prophet ﷺ made his testimony equal to that of two men.
240.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari 'Umara ibn Khuzayma al-Anshari (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa pamannya — yang merupakan salah satu sahabat Nabi ﷺ — menceritakan kepadanya bahwa Nabi ﷺ membeli seekor kuda dari seorang Badui. Nabi ﷺ memanggilnya untuk membayarnya, tetapi orang Badui itu berjalan cepat sementara Nabi ﷺ lambat. Orang-orang mengelilingi orang Badui dan menanyakan apakah ia telah menjual kepada Nabi ﷺ. Ia berkata: 'Tidak.' Kemudian Khuzayma ibn Thabit bersaksi bahwa Nabi memang telah membelinya, dan Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Apa yang membuatmu bersaksi atas sesuatu yang tidak kamu saksikan?' Ia berkata: 'Aku bersaksi dengan kebenaran wahyumu.' Maka Nabi ﷺ menjadikan kesaksiannya setara dengan dua orang.'

241.iwh_en: It was narrated from 'Umara ibn Khuzayma that Khuzayma saw in a dream that he was prostrating on the forehead of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ. He mentioned this to the Prophet ﷺ, and the Prophet ﷺ leaned down so that he could prostrate on his forehead. Then the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Khuzayma has fulfilled his dream.' And he made his testimony count as the testimony of two men.
241.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari 'Umara ibn Khuzayma bahwa Khuzayma bermimpi bahwa ia sujud di atas dahi Rasulullah ﷺ. Ia menyebutkan hal ini kepada Nabi ﷺ, dan Nabi ﷺ membungkuk sehingga ia bisa sujud di dahinya. Kemudian Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Khuzayma telah mewujudkan mimpinya.' Dan beliau menjadikan kesaksiannya senilai kesaksian dua orang.'

242.iwh_en: It was narrated from 'Umara ibn Khuzayma ibn Thabit al-Ansari — and Khuzayma is the one whose testimony the Messenger of Allah ﷺ made equal to two witnesses — that his uncle narrated to him that Khuzayma ibn Thabit al-Ansari bought a horse from a man and the man later denied the sale. Khuzayma testified for the Prophet ﷺ in a transaction, and the Prophet ﷺ made his single testimony equal to the testimony of two men.
242.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari 'Umara ibn Khuzayma ibn Thabit al-Anshari — dan Khuzayma adalah orang yang kesaksiannya dijadikan Rasulullah ﷺ setara dengan dua saksi — bahwa pamannya menceritakan kepadanya bahwa Khuzayma ibn Thabit al-Anshari membeli seekor kuda dari seseorang dan orang itu kemudian mengingkari jual beli tersebut. Khuzayma bersaksi untuk Nabi ﷺ dalam suatu transaksi, dan Nabi ﷺ menjadikan kesaksiannya seorang diri setara dengan kesaksian dua orang.'

243.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Bashir al-Ansari (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ said concerning fever: 'It is from the intense heat of Hellfire, so cool it with water.'
243.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Bashir al-Anshari (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda tentang demam: 'Ia berasal dari panasnya neraka Jahannam, maka dinginkanlah dengan air.'

244.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Bashir al-Ansari (may Allah be pleased with him) that he was with the Messenger of Allah ﷺ on one of his journeys. The Messenger of Allah ﷺ sent a messenger saying: 'Let there not remain in any camel's neck a necklace of string or any necklace, except that it be cut off.'
244.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Bashir al-Anshari (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia bersama Rasulullah ﷺ dalam salah satu perjalanannya. Rasulullah ﷺ mengutus seorang utusan yang menyampaikan: 'Janganlah dibiarkan ada kalung tali atau kalung apapun di leher unta, kecuali harus dipotong.'

245.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abdullah ibn Zayd and Abu Bashir al-Ansari (may Allah be pleased with them) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ commanded that the necklaces on the necks of camels be cut, for they were made from bows.
245.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abdullah ibn Zayd dan Abu Bashir al-Anshari (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ memerintahkan agar kalung-kalung yang ada di leher unta dipotong, karena kalung-kalung itu terbuat dari busur panah.'

246.iwh_en: It was narrated that Abu Bashir al-Ansari — the Companion of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ — saw a man with a string tied around his wrist. Abu Bashir cut it and said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ commanded that no necklace made of string should be left on any camel's neck.'
246.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan bahwa Abu Bashir al-Anshari — sahabat Rasulullah ﷺ — melihat seorang laki-laki dengan tali terikat di pergelangan tangannya. Abu Bashir memotongnya dan berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ memerintahkan agar tidak ada kalung tali yang dibiarkan di leher unta manapun.'

247.iwh_en: It was narrated from Nu'aym ibn Hazzal (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'Ma'iz ibn Malik was in my father's care. He committed fornication with a slave girl from the tribe, so my father said to him: Go to the Messenger of Allah ﷺ and inform him of what you have done, for perhaps he will seek forgiveness for you. His intent was only that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ would seek forgiveness for him. Ma'iz went and said: O Messenger of Allah, I have committed fornication — so carry out upon me the Book of Allah. The Prophet ﷺ turned away from him. He came around to the other side, and the Prophet ﷺ turned away again. He did this three times. Then on the fourth time, the Prophet ﷺ said: In what respect? He said: Fornication. So the Prophet ﷺ commanded that he be stoned.'
247.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Nu'aym ibn Hazzal (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Ma'iz ibn Malik berada dalam pengasuhan ayahku. Ia berzina dengan seorang budak perempuan dari kabilah, maka ayahku berkata kepadanya: Pergilah kepada Rasulullah ﷺ dan beritahukan apa yang telah kamu lakukan, semoga beliau memohonkan ampunan untukmu. Niatnya hanyalah agar Rasulullah ﷺ memohonkan ampunan untuknya. Ma'iz pergi dan berkata: Wahai Rasulullah, aku telah berzina — maka tegakkanlah kepadaku Kitab Allah. Nabi ﷺ berpaling darinya. Ia datang dari sisi lain, dan Nabi ﷺ berpaling lagi. Ia melakukan ini tiga kali. Kemudian pada kali keempat, Nabi ﷺ bersabda: Dalam hal apa? Ia berkata: Zina. Maka Nabi ﷺ memerintahkan agar ia dirajam.'

248.iwh_en: It was narrated from Nu'aym ibn Hazzal (may Allah be pleased with him) that Hazzal had hired Ma'iz ibn Malik as a worker, and there was a slave girl belonging to Hazzal. Ma'iz committed fornication with her. Hazzal said to him: 'Go to the Prophet ﷺ and tell him of your sin, perhaps he will find a way out for you.' So Ma'iz went to the Prophet ﷺ and mentioned what he had done. The Prophet ﷺ said: 'Perhaps you only kissed her, or touched her, or looked at her.' He said: 'No, O Messenger of Allah.' He said: 'Did you have intercourse with her?' — he used a direct term for it. He said: 'Yes.' So the Prophet ﷺ commanded that he be stoned.
248.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Nu'aym ibn Hazzal (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Hazzal telah mempekerjakan Ma'iz ibn Malik sebagai buruh, dan ada seorang budak perempuan milik Hazzal. Ma'iz berzina dengannya. Hazzal berkata kepadanya: 'Pergilah kepada Nabi ﷺ dan ceritakan dosamu, semoga beliau menemukan jalan keluar untukmu.' Maka Ma'iz pergi kepada Nabi ﷺ dan menyebutkan apa yang telah dilakukannya. Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Mungkin kamu hanya menciumnya, atau menyentuhnya, atau memandangnya.' Ia berkata: 'Tidak, wahai Rasulullah.' Beliau berkata: 'Apakah kamu berhubungan badan dengannya?' — beliau menggunakan kata yang jelas. Ia berkata: 'Ya.' Maka Nabi ﷺ memerintahkan agar ia dirajam.'

249.iwh_en: It was narrated from Nu'aym ibn Hazzal (may Allah be pleased with him) that Ma'iz ibn Malik came to the Prophet ﷺ and said: 'Carry out upon me the Book of Allah.' He turned away from him. He came back and said: 'Carry out upon me the Book of Allah — I have committed fornication.' He turned away. This happened four times. On the fourth time the Prophet ﷺ said: 'You have said this four times — with whom?' He said: 'With so-and-so.' He said: 'Did you lie down with her?' He said: 'Yes.' He said: 'So that the skin of your stomach touched the skin of her stomach?' He said: 'Yes.' He said: 'Did you enter into her as a kohl stick goes into the kohl container?' He said: 'Yes.' So the Prophet ﷺ commanded that he be stoned.
249.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Nu'aym ibn Hazzal (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Ma'iz ibn Malik datang kepada Nabi ﷺ dan berkata: 'Tegakkanlah kepadaku Kitab Allah.' Beliau berpaling darinya. Ia kembali dan berkata: 'Tegakkanlah kepadaku Kitab Allah — aku telah berzina.' Beliau berpaling. Ini terjadi empat kali. Pada kali keempat Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Kamu telah mengatakan ini empat kali — dengan siapa?' Ia berkata: 'Dengan si fulanah.' Beliau berkata: 'Apakah kamu berbaring bersamanya?' Ia berkata: 'Ya.' Beliau berkata: 'Sehingga kulit perutmu menyentuh kulit perutnya?' Ia berkata: 'Ya.' Beliau berkata: 'Apakah kamu masuk kepadanya seperti celak masuk ke dalam tempat celak?' Ia berkata: 'Ya.' Maka Nabi ﷺ memerintahkan agar ia dirajam.'

250.iwh_en: It was narrated from Nu'aym ibn Hazzal (may Allah be pleased with him) that Ma'iz ibn Malik was in his care. When he committed fornication, he said to him: 'Go to the Messenger of Allah ﷺ and inform him.' So he went and confessed his sin four times. Each time the Prophet ﷺ turned away from him, until the fourth time, and the Prophet ﷺ commanded that he be stoned. Nu'aym said: 'If only I had not sent him — it weighs heavily upon me.' The Prophet ﷺ said: 'Why do you say that, Nu'aym? He has repented a repentance that if it were divided among seventy of the people of Medina, it would suffice them. Have you ever found any man better than one who offered himself for the sake of Allah?'
250.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Nu'aym ibn Hazzal (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Ma'iz ibn Malik berada dalam pengasuhannya. Ketika ia berzina, ia berkata kepadanya: 'Pergilah kepada Rasulullah ﷺ dan beritahukan beliau.' Maka ia pergi dan mengakui dosanya empat kali. Setiap kali Nabi ﷺ berpaling darinya, hingga kali keempat, dan Nabi ﷺ memerintahkan agar ia dirajam. Nu'aym berkata: 'Seandainya aku tidak mengirimnya — hal itu sangat membebani hatiku.' Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Mengapa kamu berkata demikian, Nu'aym? Ia telah bertaubat dengan taubat yang seandainya dibagi di antara tujuh puluh penduduk Madinah, niscaya cukup untuk mereka. Pernahkah kamu menemukan orang yang lebih baik daripada orang yang menyerahkan dirinya demi Allah?'
